heading: Get started with VAC
subheading: A couple of steps to your first live deploy. {{done}} of {{total}} done.

baseDomain.title: Set your base domain
baseDomain.description: Apps get an automatic subdomain under it (e.g. my-app.example.com).
baseDomain.aRecordHint: Point an A record at this server:

firstApp.title: Deploy your first app
firstApp.description: Paste a repo URL, pick a branch and domain, and hit deploy.

twoFactor.title: Secure your account with 2FA
twoFactor.description: Add a time-based one-time code on top of your password — recommended for an internet-facing box.
